maskProvenance.eligibilityMask: per-cell lossless binary L PNG; records the complete automatic plus reviewed background-eligible domain
maskProvenance.changedPixelMask: per-cell lossless binary L PNG; exactly marks decoded source RGBA pixels changed by source processing
